anomalies.title: Monthly operating deficit
anomalies.description: The month produced a negative operating result.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Compare monthly revenue and expense drivers with budget.

anomalies.title: Negative or low cash flow
anomalies.description: Net cash flow is at or below the configured minimum.
anomalies.evidence: Net cash flow is $-1,899,352; ending cash is $3,950,648.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review operating, scholarship, and capital cash outflows.

anomalies.title: Vendor payment exceeds review threshold
anomalies.description: At least one vendor payment exceeds the configured review value.
anomalies.evidence: Maximum payment is $96,000 versus a $50,000 threshold.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Inspect the underlying vendor invoice, approval, and duplicate checks.

anomalies.title: Payroll exceeds revenue threshold

anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review payroll by department, overtime, benefits, and headcount.

anomalies.recommended_next_check: Review monthly expense categories, departments, and vendors.

anomalies.title: Statistical outlier: Monthly expenses
anomalies.description: Monthly value is unusually far from its annual mean.
anomalies.evidence: Raw value 2.20687e+06; mean 1.97158e+06; standard deviation 95520.6; z-score 2.463.
anomalies.recommended_next_check: Validate the monthly expenses source and investigate its drivers.

anomalies.title: Statistical outlier: Monthly payroll/revenue
